messages.content: 翻译Five human AAA tissues and their adjacent normal aortic tissue were collected for circRNAs sequencing. Differentially expressed circRNAs (DECs) between AAA and normal group were indentified with fold-change>1.5 and q<0.05. Then Gene Ontology (GO) and Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes (KEGG) were performed for functional enrichment annotation of the parental mRNAs of circRNAs, and followed by circRNA-miRNA-mRNA competitive endogenous RNA (ceRNA) regulatory interaction network construction. Afterwards, the differentially expressed circRNAs in circRNA-miRNA-mRNA network, and differentially expressed mRNAs (DEMs) responding to circRNAs in circRNA-miRNA-mRNA network were indirectly used for signal pathway analysis for circRNAs.

五例人类腹主动脉瘤（AAA）组织及其相邻的正常主动脉组织被收集用于环状RNA（circRNAs）测序。通过设定折叠变化大于1.5和q值小于0.05的标准，鉴定出AAA组和正常组间的差异表达circRNAs（DECs）。然后，对circRNAs的亲本mRNAs进行基因本体（GO）和京都基因与基因组百科全书（KEGG）的功能富集注释，并且构建circRNA-miRNA-mRNA竞争性内源RNA（ceRNA）调控相互作用网络。随后，在circRNA-miRNA-mRNA网络中，差异表达的circRNAs，以及对circRNAs响应的差异表达mRNAs（DEMs）被间接用于circRNAs信号途径分析。

翻译Five human AAA tissues and their adjacent normal aortic tissue were collected for sequencing. Human AAA samples were obtained with the approval of the Ethics Committee of the Affiliated Hospital of Qingdao University. The diagnosis of AAA was confirmed by computed tomography angiography prior to surgery in all patients. Adjacent normal aortic tissue and AAA samples were obtained from 5 patients with elevated IgE who underwent open surgery. All tissue samples were frozen in liquid nitrogen immediately after resection and stored at −80°C until further processing. Detailed information of patients was shown in Table 1. Quality control, sequencing and further analysis of AAA tissue samples were carried out.

收集了五例人类腹主动脉瘤（AAA）组织及其相邻的正常主动脉组织进行测序。人类AAA样本的获取已获得青岛大学附属医院伦理委员会的批准。所有患者的AAA诊断都在手术前通过计算机断层血管造影得到确认。来自5位IgE水平升高并接受开放性手术的患者的相邻正常主动脉组织和AAA样本被获取。所有组织样本在切除后立即冷冻于液氮中，并存储在-80°C下直到进一步处理。患者的详细信息显示在表1中。对AAA组织样本进行了质控、测序及进一步分析。

翻译The raw data obtained from RNA sequencing were ﬁrst ﬁltered by Trimmomatic-0.36 program to remove adapter sequences, invalid reads and low quality reads. Subsequently, rRNA residues were removed by comparing known rRNA information in RNA central database to gain clean reads. Clean reads were then mapped to the human reference genome (hg19) from UCSC genome database (http://genome. ucsc.edu/) to obtain mapped reads by BWA software and following cirRNAs identified by CIRI software (14). The criteria were as follows: GT/AG splicing signals, mismatch ≤2, back-spliced junction reads ≥1, and distance between two splice sites is no more than 100 kb as previous reported(15). The junction reads designated as circRNA expressions, and normalized by SRPBM methods (SRPBM=(junction reads∗106)/((number of reads mapping)∗(read length))). Diﬀerential expression analysis of circRNAs were performed with limma package, and identiﬁed by threshold values of fold-change >1.5 and q < 0.05.

从RNA测序中得到的原始数据首先使用Trimmomatic-0.36程序进行过滤，以去除接头序列、无效读取和低质量读取。随后，通过比对RNA中心数据库中已知的rRNA信息去除rRNA残留，获得干净的读取序列。然后将干净的读取序列映射到美国加州大学圣克鲁斯分校基因组数据库（http://genome.ucsc.edu/）中的人类参考基因组（hg19），通过BWA软件获得映射读取序列，并随后使用CIRI软件（14）识别出环状RNA（cirRNAs）。其标准如下：GT/AG拼接信号、错配≤2、返向拼接接头读取数≥1，以及两个拼接位点之间的距离不超过10万bp，如先前报道所述（15）。环结读取数被认为是circRNA的表达，通过SRPBM方法进行标准化（SRPBM=(环结读取数*10^6)/((映射读取数)*(读取长度)））。差异表达的circRNAs分析是利用limma软件包完成，并通过折叠变化值>1.5和q值<0.05的阈值标准来鉴定。

翻译Based on the principle that circRNAs can target and combine its parental genes, we performed functional enrichment annotation analysis on circRNA. The GO and KEGG pathway analysis of differentially expressed circRNAs were accomplished by using clusterProfiler package in R software.
基于circRNAs可以靶向并结合其亲本基因的原理，我们对circRNAs进行了功能富集注释分析。通过使用R软件中的clusterProfiler包，完成了差异表达的circRNAs的基因本体（GO）和京都基因和基因组百科全书（KEGG）路径分析。

翻译The circRNA-miRNA-mRNA network was constructed based on the same transcriptional expression level trend between circRNA and its corresponding mRNA.  The paired miRNA-circRNA, and miRNA-mRNA interaction analyses were predicted by mirdb software. In the circRNA-miRNA-mRNA network, only differentially expressed mRNAs (DEMs) and circRNAs were selected for further analysis.
基于circRNA及其对应mRNA之间相同的转录表达水平趋势，构建了circRNA-miRNA-mRNA网络。成对的miRNA-circRNA和miRNA-mRNA相互作用分析是通过mirdb软件预测的。在circRNA-miRNA-mRNA网络中，仅选择了差异表达的mRNAs（DEMs）和circRNAs进行进一步分析。

翻译Based on the DEMs in the above circRNA-miRNA-mRNA interaction network, a signal pathway analysis was performed in the GENCLIP3 (http://ci.smu.edu.cn/ genclip3/analysis.php) (16). The analyzing operation can be done according to the prompt of the website. The term with P-Value <0.05 was considered as significant.
基于上述circRNA-miRNA-mRNA相互作用网络中的DEMs，使用GENCLIP3（http://ci.smu.edu.cn/genclip3/analysis.php）（16）进行了信号途径分析。分析操作可以根据网站的提示进行。P值小于0.05的项目被认为是显著的。

翻译As shown in Table 1, sample t1-t5 represent abdominal aortic aneurysm tissue from patient, while b1-b5 represent adjacent normal aortic tissue from healthy donor. The average dose of IgE used to treat AAA patients is 713.6g/L. The other more detailed clinical diagnosis information was illustrated in the Table 1.
如表1所示，样本t1-t5代表来自患者的腹主动脉瘤组织，而b1-b5代表来自健康捐献者的相邻正常主动脉组织。用于治疗AAA患者的平均IgE剂量是713.6克/升。其他更详细的临床诊断信息在表1中说明。

翻译A total of 6373 circRNAs were identified, including 3492 known circRNAs and 2881 New circRNAs (Figure 1A). The correlation scatter plot showed that the circRNAs expression profile was close between the two group samples (Figure 1B). The volcano plot clearly showed the number of circRNAs differentially expressed between AAA and normal arteries (Figure 1C). A total of 325 circRNAs were differentially expressed, of which 216 were up-regulated and 109 were down-regulated (Figure 1D, and Table S1).
共鉴定出6373个circRNAs，包括3492个已知circRNAs和2881个新circRNAs（图1A）。相关性散点图显示了两组样本之间circRNAs表达谱的接近性（图1B）。火山图清晰展示了AAA与正常动脉之间差异性表达的circRNAs数量（图1C）。共有325个circRNAs表达差异，其中216个上调，109个下调（图1D和表S1）。

翻译Gene Ontology (GO) and Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes (KEGG) Pathway analyses were used to analyze the major functions of differentially expressed circRNAs (Figure 2). As a result, the most enriched biological process (BP) terms were chemical synaptic transmission, histone mRNA catabolic process, axo-dendritic transport, etc (Figure 2A). For cellular component (CC), these circRNAs were enriched in nucleus and perinuclear region of cytoplasm (Figure 2B). The most enriched molecular function (MF) terms were GTP binding, chaprone binding, RNA polymerase Ⅱ core binding and pritein binding (Figure 2C). KEGG analysis found that circRNAs were enriched in HTLV-I infection and central carbon metabolism in cancer (Figure 2D).

基因本体（GO）和京都基因和基因组百科全书（KEGG）路径分析被用于分析差异表达的circRNAs的主要功能（图2）。结果显示，最富集的生物过程（BP）术语包括化学突触传递、组蛋白mRNA降解过程、轴突-树突运输等（图2A）。在细胞组分（CC）方面，这些circRNAs在细胞核和细胞质围核区域富集（图2B）。最富集的分子功能（MF）术语是GTP结合、辅酶结合、RNA聚合酶II核心结合和蛋白质结合（图2C）。KEGG分析发现circRNAs在HTLV-I感染和癌症中的中心碳代谢中富集（图2D）。

翻译 Construction of circRNA-miRNA-mRNA ceRNA interaction network  
As shown in Figure 3, We showed 10 differentially expressed circRNAs, 14 miRNAs and 10 DEMs participated in ceRNA network construction. In addition, we found circZEB1/miR-6749-3p/KLF4 axis might be a potential research target for AAA through further analysis of interaction between circRNA-miRNA and miRNA-mRNA

构建circRNA-miRNA-mRNA ceRNA相互作用网络

如图3所示，我们展示了10个差异表达的circRNAs、14个miRNAs和10个DEMs参与了ceRNA网络构建。此外，我们发现通过对circRNA-miRNA和miRNA-mRNA相互作用的进一步分析，circZEB1/miR-6749-3p/KLF4轴可能是腹主动脉瘤（AAA）的潜在研究对象。

翻译As for the signal pathway of these differentially expressed circRNAs involved, we used GENCLIP3 to achieve functional enrichment analysis. We uploaded the genes into the GENCLIP3 search box, and found that the significant pathway was enriched in the pathways in cancer (KEGG) (P-Value = 0.038589) (Table S3).
对于这些差异表达的circRNAs所涉及的信号途径，我们使用GENCLIP3完成了功能富集分析。我们将基因上传到GENCLIP3搜索框，并发现显著的途径在癌症途径（KEGG）中富集（P值=0.038589）（表S3）。

翻译Human specimens were used to verify the different expression of miR-150-5p in normal and AAA tissues. The cell counting kit 8 was used to determine the cell viabilities of transfected cells with up-regulated or down-regulated miR-150-5p expression. Wound healing assay and transwell assay were used to evaluate the proliferation and migration of VSMCs. The hypothetical targets for miR-150-5p were predicted using the bioinformatics analysis and the downstream targets of miR-150-5p were further verified via the quantitative real-time polymerase chain reaction (qRT-PCR) and Western Blot in VSMCs. Finally, this interaction was finally confirmed in both human and animal specimens AAA tissues.

人体标本被用来验证正常和AAA组织中miR-150-5p表达的差异。细胞计数试剂盒-8（CCK-8）用来测定转染了上调或下调miR-150-5p表达的细胞的活力。创伤愈合试验和Transwell试验被用来评估血管平滑肌细胞（VSMCs）的增殖和迁移。miR-150-5p的假定靶标通过生物信息学分析进行预测，miR-150-5p的下游靶标通过在VSMCs中的定量实时聚合酶链反应（qRT-PCR）和西方印迹（Western Blot）进一步验证。最后，这种相互作用最终在人和动物AAA组织标本中得到确认。

翻译Clinical specimens
All clinical AAA samples were randomly selected from volunteers who underwent open AAA repair, and control samples were obtained from volunteers' non-aneurysm aortic segment with same age and sex. None of the AAA patients were in a state of clinically unstable such as arterial aneurysm rupture before surgery. AAA diameter measured from computed tomography were from the range of 38 to 80 mm (55.3 ± 3.5 mm). The proportion of risk factors for each patient as follows: 9 patients had hypertension, 7 had hyperlipidemia, 10 had smoked, and 3 had diabetes of 15 patients. All samples were rinsed with normal saline immediately after removal, and stored in the refrigerator at -80°C after quickly frozen with liquid nitrogen. All experiments using human aortic samples were approved by the ethics committee of the Affiliated Hospital of Qingdao University, and all volunteers were given informed consent.

临床标本
所有的临床AAA样本均随机选自接受开放式AAA修复手术的志愿者，对照样本来自同年龄和性别志愿者的非动脉瘤主动脉段。手术前，所有的AAA患者均处于非动脉瘤破裂的稳定临床状态。计算机断层扫描测量的AAA直径范围从38毫米到80毫米（55.3 ± 3.5毫米）。各患者的危险因素比例如下：15位患者中，9位有高血压，7位有高血脂，10位有吸烟史，3位有糖尿病。所有样本在取出后立即用生理盐水冲洗，并在液氮快速冷冻后储存在-80°C的冰箱中。使用人类主动脉样本的所有实验均获得青岛大学附属医院伦理委员会的批准，所有志愿者均已知情同意。

翻译Bioinformatics analysis
The potential downstream target genes of miR-150-5p was predicted through four databases: miRwalk (http://mirwalk.umm.uni-heidelberg.de/), Targetscan (http://www.targetscan.org/vert_80/), miRDB (http://mirdb.org/), and miRTarBase (https://maayanlab.cloud/Harmonizome/resource/MiRTarBase). All the predicted downstream genes were intercrossed to obtain the key genes.

生物信息学分析
miR-150-5p的潜在下游靶基因通过以下四个数据库预测：miRwalk（http://mirwalk.umm.uni-heidelberg.de/），Targetscan（http://www.targetscan.org/vert_80/），miRDB（http://mirdb.org/），和miRTarBase（https://maayanlab.cloud/Harmonizome/resource/MiRTarBase）。所有预测的下游基因进行了交叉比对，以获得关键基因。

翻译Establishment of AAA mouse models
In amount of 39 C57BL/6 mice, weighing 12–15 g and aged 3 weeks, were purchased from Pengyue. (Qingdao, China). Mice were kept in an air-conditioned room with a regular light-dark cycle, free food and water, and weighed every 3 days. We used the classic induction model to establish a mouse AAA model.[12] Mice were divided into control group, injury group and injury + Agomir group, with 13 mice in each group. Itraperitoneal injection of angiotensinII (AngII) (Sigma-Aldrich, Shanghai, China) 4.0 mg/kg/8 h with intraperitoneal injection of β-aminopropionitrile (BAPN) (Sigma-Aldrich, Shanghai, China) 0.33 g/kg/d were used to construct the AAA model for injury group and injury + agomir group. Used equal volume of saline for same treatment to control group. The whole process lasted 14 days totally. Meanwhile, mice in injury + agomir group received tail vein injection of miR-150-5p agomir (0.625 mg/kg/d) at the same time. MiR-150-5p antagomir was designed and synthesized by ThermoFisher (Shanghai, China) (sense: 5′-GCAGUCAAAUGCUCUACCACUGAGCUAUACCCCCC-3′; antisense: 5′-GGGUAUAGCUCAGUGGUAGAGCAUUUGACUGCUU-3′). Antagomir (0.625mg/kg) was transfected in vivo twice weekly with the plasmid /PEI/PEG mixture. After 14 days, the mice were sacrificed and dissected during this period. All abdominal aortas were taken out for pathological observation, RNA extraction and total protein extraction. All animal experiment protocols were approved by the Animal Care and Use Committee of Qingdao University.

创建AAA小鼠模型

购买了39只C57BL/6小鼠，体重12-15克，年龄3周，来自青岛鹏越公司。小鼠被饲养在有定时光暗周期、充足食物和水的空调房间里，并每3天称重一次。我们使用了经典诱导模型来建立小鼠的AAA模型。[12] 将小鼠分为对照组、损伤组和损伤+Agomir组，每组13只。对损伤组和损伤+agomir组的小鼠行每8小时一次腹腔注射血管紧张素II（AngII）（4.0毫克/千克，Sigma-Aldrich, 上海，中国）和每天一次腹腔注射β-氨基丙烯腈（BAPN）（0.33克/千克，Sigma-Aldrich, 上海，中国）以构建AAA模型。对照组小鼠使用等体积的生理盐水进行同样的治疗。整个过程共持续14天。与此同时，损伤+agomir组的小鼠同时通过尾静脉注射miR-150-5p agomir（0.625毫克/千克/天）进行治疗。miR-150-5p antagomir由ThermoFisher（上海，中国）设计和合成（正向：5′-GCAGUCAAAUGCUCUACCACUGAGCUAUACCCCCC-3′；反向：5′-GGGUAUAGCUCAGUGGUAGAGCAUUUGACUGCUU-3′）。Antagomir（0.625mg/kg）在体内与质粒/PEI/PEG混合物一同每周两次转染。14天后，小鼠被处死，此期间进行解剖。取出所有腹主动脉用于病理学观察、RNA提取和总蛋白提取。所有动物实验方案均得到青岛大学动物护理和使用委员会的批准。

翻译H&E staining
A part of intact AAA samples and control samples were placed in Tissue OCT-Freeze Medium for 5-10 minutes after taken out. Then, transfer them with liquid nitrogen and store in the refrigerator at -80℃. Cut the frozen tissue into 5 m sections and stain with hematoxylin and eosin. Finally, the slices were observed under an optical microscope.

苏木精-伊红（H&E）染色

取出后，将一部分完整的AAA样本和对照样本置于组织冰冻保护剂（Tissue OCT-Freeze Medium）中5-10分钟。然后，用液氮转移并存放在-80℃的冰箱中。将冷冻组织切成5微米厚的切片并用苏木精和伊红染色。最后，在光学显微镜下观察切片。

翻译 Immunohistochemistry
Frozen sections of mouse abdominal aorta were soaked for 10 min at 100°C in Phosphate buffer saline (Meilunbio, Shanghai, China) for clean. The activity of endogenous peroxidase was blocked by three percent hydrogen peroxide solution. Bovine Serum Albumin (3%) was used for blocking for 1 hour. Then, the mouse monoclonal EPHB2 antibody (#sc-130068, Santa, Shanghai, China) and EGR2 antibody (#sc-293195, Santa, USA) was used in a 1:50 dilution (0.02 μg/µL) and applied to the sections for 7 hours at 4℃ temperature. After washing, secondary biotin-conjugated antibodies (goat anti-mouse, Absin, Shanghai, China) were added for 60 min at room temperature. The diaminobenzidine peroxidase substrate kit (Vector Laboratories) was chose to visualize positively stained cells and the Hematoxylin Staining Solution was used to color the nucleus. The slices were finally observed under an optical microscope (Nikon, Shanghai, China) and staining changes were compared among three groups.

免疫组化

将小鼠腹主动脉的冷冻切片在100℃的磷酸盐缓冲溶液（Meilunbio，上海，中国）中浸泡10分钟以清洁。3%的过氧化氢溶液被用于阻断内源性过氧化物酶的活性。使用3%的牛血清白蛋白（Bovine Serum Albumin）封闭1小时。然后，将小鼠单克隆EPHB2抗体（#sc-130068，Santa，上海，中国）和EGR2抗体（#sc-293195，Santa，美国）以1:50的稀释比例（0.02μg/μL）应用于切片上，4℃温度下孵育7小时。洗涤后，加入标记生物素的二级抗体（山羊抗小鼠，Absin，上海，中国）在室温下孵育60分钟。选择二氨基苯基肼过氧化物酶底物试剂盒（Vector Laboratories）以可视化呈阳性染色的细胞，用苏木素染色液对细胞核上色。最后在光学显微镜下（Nikon，上海，中国）观察切片，并比较三组间的染色变化。

翻译Cell Culture and transfection
Human VSMCs were purchased from National Collection of Authenticated Cell Cultures (Shanghai, China) and cultured in DMEM medium (Gibco, Shanghai, China) with 10% fetal bovine serum (Gibco, Shanghai, China) in a standard environment (5% CO2 humidified at 37°C). The MiR-150-5p mimics (5′-UCUCCCAACCCUUGUACCAGUG-3′), miR-150-5p inhibitor (5′-CACUGGUACAAGGGUUGGGAGA-3′), negative control oligonucleotide (NC) (5′-UUCUCCGAACGUGUCACGUTT-3′) and inhibitor-NC (5′-CAGUACUUUUGUGUAGUACAA-3′) (ThermoFisher, Shanghai, China) were transfected into the VSMCs using LipofectamineTM 2000 (Invitrogen, California, United States).

细胞培养和转染

人类血管平滑肌细胞（VSMCs）由中国上海全国认证细胞株库购得，并在标准环境（37°C下的5%二氧化碳湿润环境）中用含有10%胎牛血清（Gibco, 上海，中国）的DMEM培养基（Gibco, 上海，中国）中培养。miR-150-5p模拟物（5′-UCUCCCAACCCUUGUACCAGUG-3′），miR-150-5p抑制剂（5′-CACUGGUACAAGGGUUGGGAGA-3′），负对照寡核苷酸（NC）（5′-UUCUCCGAACGUGUCACGUTT-3′）和抑制剂-NC（5′-CAGUACUUUUGUGUAGUACAA-3′）（ThermoFisher, 上海，中国）使用LipofectamineTM 2000（Invitrogen, 加州, 美国）转染至VSMCs中。

翻译 RNA Extraction and qRT-PCR
Total RNAs were extracted from VSMCs using Trizol reagent (SparkJade, Shandong, China), under the guidance of instruction. cDNA was reverse-transcribed by Hifair® Ⅱ 1st Strand cDNA Synthesis Kit (Yaesen, Shanghai, China). qRT-PCR was operated using SYBR Premix Ex Taq (Yaesen, Shanghai, China). Target genes expression was normalized by the GAPDH housekeeping gene and quantified by the 2ΔΔCT method.

RNA提取和qRT-PCR

使用Trizol试剂（SparkJade, 山东, 中国）根据说明书指导从VSMCs中提取总RNA。cDNA通过Hifair® Ⅱ 1st Strand cDNA Synthesis Kit（Yaesen, 上海, 中国）进行逆转录。使用SYBR Premix Ex Taq（Yaesen, 上海, 中国）操作qRT-PCR。目标基因表达通过GAPDH内参基因归一化，并通过2-ΔΔCT方法进行定量。

翻译Western blot
Total proteins of VSMCs were extracted by radio immunoprecipitation assay (RIPA) lysis buffer (T-PER, Shanghai, China) and using the bicinchoninic acid (BCA) protein quantitation kit (Yamei, Shanghai, China) to measure the concentration of protein. All steps before the target antibodies incubation were performed based on previous research. Incubating membranes overnight at 4°C by the mouse anti-EPHB2 antibody (1:2000, #sc-130068, Santa, Shanghai, China) and mouse anti-EGR2 antibody (1:2000, #sc-293195, Santa, Shanghai, China). The housekeeping gene β-actin was served as an internal control. Afterwards, membranes were incubated with relevant using HRP-conjugated secondary antibody goat anti-mouse (1:8, 000 dillution, Absin, Shanghai, China) at 37°C for 1 h. The bands were visualized with a Fusion FX7 System. Densitometric was analyzed by ImageJ software.

西方印迹（Western blot）

通过放射免疫共沉淀分析（RIPA）裂解液（T-PER，上海，中国）提取VSMCs的总蛋白，并使用比色蛋白测定试剂盒（BCA，Yamei，上海，中国）来测量蛋白质浓度。靶抗体孵育前的所有步骤均依据先前的研究进行。通过小鼠抗-EPHB2抗体（1:2000，#sc-130068，Santa，上海，中国）和小鼠抗-EGR2抗体（1:2000，#sc-293195，Santa，上海，中国）将膜在4°C下过夜孵育。内参基因β-actin用作内部对照。之后，将膜在37°C下与相关的辣根过氧化物酶（HRP）结合的二级抗体山羊抗小鼠（1:8000稀释，Absin，上海，中国）孵育1小时。使用Fusion FX7系统可视化条带。利用ImageJ软件进行密度计分析。

翻译Firstly,  the   mRNA  expression   proﬁle  datasets GSE57691  and  GSE47472  from  Gene  Expression  Omnibus  database were screened,  and  principal  component  analysis  was  carried  out.  Next,  the R  software  (version  4.0.0)  was  used  to  analyze  potentially  differentially expressed genes associated with AAA and ferroptosis. Subsequently, protein – protein interaction analysis, gene ontology enrichment analysis, and Kyoto Encyclopedia  of  Genes  and  Genomes  pathway  enrichment  analysis were performed on the selected candidate genes.  Finally, quantitative real-time polymerase chain reaction (qRT-PCR) was used to detect the expression levels of the ﬁrst ﬁve selected abnormal ferroptosis-related genes in clinical samples obtained from patients with AAA and healthy controls.

首先，从基因表达综合数据库筛选了mRNA表达谱数据集GSE57691和GSE47472，并进行了主成分分析。接下来，使用R软件（版本4.0.0）分析与AAA和铁死亡相关的潜在差异表达基因。随后，对筛选的候选基因进行蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用分析、基因本体富集分析以及京都基因和基因组百科全书路径富集分析。最后，使用定量实时聚合酶链反应（qRT-PCR）检测在AAA患者和健康对照者临床样本中筛选出的前五个异常铁死亡相关基因的表达水平。

翻译Based on the information contained in the two datasets, a total of 20 differentially expressed ferroptosis-related genes (three upregulated genes and  17  downregulated  genes)  were  selected.  Protein – protein  interaction analysis demonstrated interaction between these genes, while gene ontology enrichment analysis of ferroptosis genes with differential expression indicated that  some  enrichment  items  were  associated  with  oxidative  stress.  The qRT-PCR  results showed that the expression  levels of  interleukin-6  (IL-6), peroxiredoxin 1 (PRDX1), and stearoyl-CoA desaturase (SCD) were consistent with the bioinformatics prediction results obtained from the mRNA chip.

基于这两个数据集中包含的信息，共选出了20个差异表达的与铁死亡相关的基因（3个上调基因和17个下调基因）。蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用分析显示这些基因之间有相互作用，而对差异表达的铁死亡基因进行基因本体富集分析表明一些富集项目与氧化应激有关。qRT-PCR的结果显示，白细胞介素-6（IL-6）、过氧化物酶体酶1（PRDX1）和硬脂酰-CoA去饱和酶（SCD）的表达水平与mRNA芯片得到的生物信息学预测结果一致。

翻译Patients with AAA and healthy
individuals
From July 2021 to May 2022, we collected clinical samples from  ﬁve  patients  with  AAA  and  ﬁve  healthy  individuals at  The  Aﬃliated  Hospital  of Qingdao  University  (Qingdao, China);  these  patients  formed  the  case  and  control  groups, respectively  (Table  1).  The  diagnostic  criteria  for  patients with AAA were an artery diameter  >3 cm or artery dilation (1.5-fold   change)  versus   the   normal   artery   size,   detected through imaging examination. All participants provided written informed  consent  for  their  participation  in  the  study.  The study was  approved by the  medical  ethics  committee  of the hospital.

患有AAA的患者和健康个体

从2021年7月至2022年5月，我们在青岛大学附属医院（中国青岛）收集了5位AAA患者和5位健康个体的临床样本；这些患者分别构成了病例组和对照组（表1）。AAA患者的诊断标准是动脉直径>3厘米或通过影像检查确认的动脉扩张（与正常动脉大小相比变化1.5倍）。所有参与者都为他们参加研究提供了书面知情同意。该研究已获得医院医学伦理委员会的批准。

翻译RNA extraction and quantitative
real-time PCR (qRT-PCR)
The    Kz- 111-fp    high-speed    low-temperature    grinding instrument    (Servicebio,    Qingdao,    China)    and    TRIZOL reagent  (Vazyme,  Qingdao,  China)  were  used  to  grind  the tissues and extract total RNA. Reverse transcription to cDNA was  performed  according  to  instructions  provided  by  the manufacturer  (SparkJade,  Qingdao,  China).  The  2  x SYBR Green qPCR Mix (SparkJade) was used, and the reaction was run at 94o C for 3 min, 94o C for  10 s, and 60o C for 30 s and >40 cycles. All experimental data are presented as the mean values obtained from three independent experiments and were
analyzed statistically using the 2一 △△  cycle threshold method. Glyceraldehyde-3-phosphate   dehydrogenase   (GAPDH)   was used as internal reference. The primers used for qRT-PCR are listed in Table 2.

RNA提取与定量实时PCR（qRT-PCR）

使用Kz-111-fp高速低温研磨器（Servicebio，中国青岛）和TRIZOL试剂（Vazyme，中国青岛）研磨组织并提取总RNA。按照生产商（SparkJade，中国青岛）提供的说明进行cDNA的反转录。使用2倍浓度的SYBR Green qPCR混合液（SparkJade），反应条件设定为94℃ 3分钟，94℃ 10秒，60℃ 30秒，循环>40次。所有实验数据是来自三次独立实验的平均值，并采用2-ΔΔ循环阈值（cycle threshold）方法进行统计分析。甘油醛-3-磷酸脱氢酶（GAPDH）作为内参。用于qRT-PCR的引物列在表2中。

翻译Retrospective analysis of differential     expression of ferroptosis-related genes in abdominal aortic aneurysm
Firstly, principal component analysis (PCA) was performed on   the   two   groups   of   data   (Supplementary   Figure   1). Then  we  eliminated  the  batch  eﬀect  in  PCA  (Figure  2A). Subsequently, utilizing the adjusted P-value  < 0.05 and | log2(fold  change)|  > 0.5  as  the  standards,  we  selected  20  genes from the 259 ferroptosis-related genes (three upregulated genes and  17 downregulated genes)  (Table 3). The 20 diﬀerentially expressed  ferroptosis-related  genes  between  the  AAA  and normal  groups  identiﬁed  in  the  GSE57691  and  GSE47472 databases  are  shown  in  volcano  (Figure  2B)  and  heatmap (Figure  2C)  plots.  The  expression  patterns  of 20  candidate genes  in  AAA  and  normal  samples  are  shown  in  a  box plot  (Figure 3).  Of the three upregulated genes,  interleukin- 6  (IL-6)  and  solute  carrier  family  2  member  3  (SLC2A3) had statistically signiﬁcant changes in expression. Among the downregulated  genes,  charged  multivesicular  body  protein  5 (CHMP5), asparagine synthetase (ASNS), aconitase 1 (ACO1), metadherin  (MTDH),  etc.  exhibited  signiﬁcant  changes  in expression.

腹主动脉瘤铁死亡相关基因差异表达的回顾性分析

首先，我们对两组数据进行了主成分分析（PCA）（补充图1）。然后，我们在PCA中消除了批次效应（图2A）。随后，利用调整后的P值 < 0.05和|log2(折叠变化)| > 0.5作为标准，我们从259个与铁死亡相关的基因中选出了20个基因（3个上调基因和17个下调基因）（表3）。在GSE57691和GSE47472数据库中鉴定出的20个AAA和正常组之间差异表达的铁死亡相关基因在火山图（图2B）和热图（图2C）中展示。20个候选基因在AAA和正常样本中的表达模式在箱线图中显示（图3）。在三个上调基因中，白细胞介素-6（IL-6）和溶质载体家族2成员3（SLC2A3）的表达变化在统计上有显著差异。在下调基因中，带电的多泡体蛋白5（CHMP5）、天冬氨酰合成酶（ASNS）、aconitase 1（ACO1）、metadherin（MTDH）等显示出显著的表达变化。

翻译Validation of differentially expressed   ferroptosis-related candidate genes in abdominal aortic aneurysm clinical     samples
To further examine the expression of diﬀerentially expressed ferroptosis-related  genes  in  AAA,  we  examined  the  top  ﬁve diﬀerentially  expressed  candidate  genes  and  detected  their expression  in  clinical  samples  by  qRT-PCR  (Figure  7).  Our results  showed  that  IL-6,  SCD,  and  PRDX1  in  the  clinical
samples of AAA demonstrated statistically signiﬁcant changes in  expression.  Although  TXNIP  and  NOX4  showed  a  trend consistent with our expectations, the observed change was not statistically signiﬁcant.

在腹主动脉瘤临床样本中验证差异表达的铁死亡相关候选基因

为了进一步检测腹主动脉瘤（AAA）中差异表达的铁死亡相关基因，我们检查了五个表达差异最大的候选基因，并通过qRT-PCR检测了它们在临床样本中的表达（图7）。我们的结果显示，IL-6、SCD和PRDX1在AAA的临床样本中表达变化在统计学上有显著差异。尽管TXNIP和NOX4显示出与我们预期一致的趋势，但观察到的变化在统计学上并不显著。

翻译Veriﬁcation of the expression of the ﬁrst ﬁve hub candidate     genes in clinical samples: IL-6, PRDX1, SCD, TXNIP, and NOX4. P-values were calculated using the Student’s t-test. *P < 0.05; **P < 0.01; ***P < 0.001. IL-6, interleukin-6; PRDX1,                peroxiredoxin 1; SCD, stearoyl-CoA desaturase; TXNIP,             thioredoxin interacting protein; NOX4, NADPH oxidase 4; ns,  non-signiﬁcant.
在临床样本中验证前五个中心候选基因的表达：IL-6、PRDX1、SCD、TXNIP和NOX4。P值使用学生t检验计算。*P < 0.05；**P < 0.01；***P < 0.001。 IL-6，白细胞介素-6；PRDX1，过氧化物酶体酶1；SCD，硬脂酰-CoA去饱和酶；TXNIP，硫氧还蛋白互作蛋白；NOX4，NADPH氧化酶4；ns，非显著。

翻译In this study, we download several mRNA expression datasets
and scRNA-seq datasets of the early-stage AAA models from the NCBIGEO database. mMCP-counter and CIBERSORT were used to assess
immune infiltration in early-stage experimental AAA. The scRNA-seq
datasets were then utilized to analyze AAA-related gene modules of
monocytes/macrophages infiltrated into the early-stage AAA by Weighted
Correlation Network analysis (WGCNA). After that, Gene Ontology (GO) and
Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes (KEGG) functional enrichment
analysis for the module genes was performed by ClusterProfiler. The STRING
database was used to create the protein-protein interaction (PPI) network.
The Differentially Expressed Genes (DEGs) of the monocytes/macrophages
were explored by Limma-Voom and the key gene set were identified. Then We
further examined the expression of key genes in the human AAA dataset and
built a logistic diagnostic model for distinguishing AAA patients and healthy
people. Finally, real-time quantitative polymerase chain reaction (RT-qPCR)
and Enzyme Linked Immunosorbent Assay (ELISA) were performed to validate
the gene expression and serum protein level between the AAA and healthy
donor samples in our cohort.

在这项研究中，我们从NCBI-GEO数据库下载了几个早期AAA模型的mRNA表达数据集及单细胞RNA测序（scRNA-seq）数据集。mMCP-counter和CIBERSORT被用来评估早期实验性AAA中的免疫浸润。然后，利用scRNA-seq数据集，通过加权相关网络分析（WGCNA）分析渗入早期AAA的单核细胞/巨噬细胞相关的基因模块。在此之后，通过ClusterProfiler进行模块基因的基因本体（GO）和京都基因和基因组百科全书（KEGG）功能富集分析。STRING数据库被用来创建蛋白-蛋白相互作用（PPI）网络。通过Limma-Voom探索单核细胞/巨噬细胞的差异表达基因（DEGs），并识别关键基因集。随后，我们进一步检验了人类AAA数据集中关键基因的表达，并构建了一个区分AAA患者和健康人的逻辑诊断模型。最后，进行了实时定量聚合酶链式反应（RT-qPCR）和酶联免疫吸附试验（ELISA），以验证我们队列中AAA与健康捐赠者样本间的基因表达和血清蛋白水平。

翻译Real-time quantitative polymerase
chain reaction and enzyme linked
immunosorbent assay
Aortic specimens were ground in liquid nitrogen, and
RNAiso Plus reagent (Takara 9109, Shiga, Japan) was used
to extract total RNAs, and the concentration and purity
of total RNA were detected by a nanometer photometer
(IMPLEN). After that, reverse transcription was performed
using PrimeScript RT reagent Kit with gDNA Eraser (TaKaRa
RR047A, Shiga, Japan). Real-time quantitative polymerase chain
reaction (RT-qPCR) was conducted using TB Green R
 Premix Ex
Taq (TaKaRa RR420A, Shiga, Japan) on an ABI Q3 7500 RealTime PCR System (ABI). ACTB was used as internal controls,
and the relative expression level of the target gene was calculated
as 2−1 Ct, where −1 Ct = (Ct, target gene − Ct, ACTB).
Statistical analysis was conducted with GraphPad Primer 8.0
(GraphPad Software Inc., GraphPad Prism 8.0.1.2). Primer
sequences used in the study were listed in Supplementary

实时定量聚合酶链式反应和酶联免疫吸附试验

主动脉标本在液氮中研磨，RNAiso Plus试剂（Takara 9109，滋贺，日本）被用来提取总RNA，并且通过纳米光度计（IMPLEN）检测总RNA的浓度和纯度。之后，使用PrimeScript RT试剂盒包含gDNA Eraser（TaKaRa RR047A，滋贺，日本）进行逆转录。实时定量聚合酶链式反应（RT-qPCR）使用TB Green Premix Ex Taq（TaKaRa RR420A，滋贺，日本）在ABI Q3 7500 Real-Time PCR系统（ABI）上进行。使用ACTB作为内部对照，目标基因的相对表达量计算为2^(-ΔCt)，其中-ΔCt = (Ct, 目标基因 - Ct, ACTB)。统计分析使用GraphPad Primer 8.0进行（GraphPad软件公司，GraphPad Prism 8.0.1.2）。在研究中使用的引物序列列于补充资料中。

翻译Total RNAs were extracted from VSMCs using Trizol reagent (SparkJade, Shandong, China), under the guidance of instruction. cDNA was reverse-transcribed by Hifair® Ⅱ 1st Strand cDNA Synthesis Kit (Yaesen, Shanghai, China). qRT-PCR was operated using SYBR Premix Ex Taq (Yaesen, Shanghai, China). Target genes expression was normalized by the GAPDH housekeeping gene and quantified by the 2ΔΔCT method.

使用Trizol试剂（SparkJade, 山东，中国）在说明书的指导下从VSMCs中提取总RNA。cDNA通过Hifair® Ⅱ 1st Strand cDNA Synthesis Kit（Yaesen, 上海，中国）进行逆转录。qRT-PCR使用SYBR Premix Ex Taq（Yaesen, 上海，中国）进行操作。目标基因表达通过GAPDH内参基因归一化，并通过2-ΔΔCT方法进行定量。

翻译RNA pull-down assay
Following the procedure, the miR-150-5p probe (5′-CACTGGTACAAGGGTTGGGAGA-3′) (Tsingke, Beijing, China) was incubated with streptavidin magnetic beads (Dynabeads FlowComp, Shanghai, China) at room temperature for 2 hours to generate probe-coated beads. The VSMCs lysate was further washed with probe-coated magnetic beads (Dynabeads FlowComp, Shanghai, China) at 4°C for 6 hours. RNAs extracted from the cell lysate was used for qRT-PCR detection after buffer washed.

RNA拉下实验（RNA pull-down assay）

根据程序，miR-150-5p探针（5'-CACTGGTACAAGGGTTGGGAGA-3'）（Tsingke，北京，中国）在室温下与链霉亲和素磁珠（Dynabeads FlowComp，上海，中国）孵育2小时，生成探针包裹的磁珠。血管平滑肌细胞（VSMCs）裂解液随后在4°C下使用探针包裹的磁珠（Dynabeads FlowComp，上海，中国）清洗6小时。从细胞裂解液中提取的RNA在缓冲液清洗后用于qRT-PCR检测。
写一篇关于腹主动脉瘤EVAR术后二型内漏的引言，并附参考文献

腹主动脉瘤（AAA）是一种常见的血管病症，表现为腹主动脉区域的局部性扩张，若不经处理，可能导致动脉破裂，这是一种危及生命的紧急情况。经过血管内修复术（Endovascular Aneurysm Repair, EVAR）作为一种微创手术方法，已成为治疗AAA的常规手段。EVAR手术具有创伤小、恢复快等优点，近年来得到了广泛的应用[1-3]。

然而，EVAR术后并不意味着治疗的彻底完成，因术后可能发生一系列并发症，其中二型内漏（Type II Endoleak）是较为常见且具有潜在风险的一种。二型内漏是指因腔内支架移位、密封不完整或原有侧支管血流重新灌注导致漏内血袋持续或间断地增大，可能最终致使AAA破裂[4]。据统计，EVAR术后二型内漏的发生率约占所有内漏类型的10%-20%[5]。

治疗二型内漏的策略目前尚存在争议，轻微的二型内漏可能不需要立即干预，可以通过密切观察跟进，但对于随访中AAA扩张或持续的二型内漏则需考虑及时的介入治疗[6]。当前对于二型内漏干预方式的研究仍处于不断探索之中，包括通过手术直接修复、血管导管化疗法或利用液体栓塞剂等[7]。

为了降低二型内漏对EVAR治疗后果的影响，寻求更有效的预防和管理策略是当前研究的重要方向。多项研究正在致力于了解二型内漏发生的风险因素、监测方法以及预后评价，以提高EVAR治疗的长期成功率[8]。

参考文献：
[1] Greenhalgh RM, Brown LC, Kwong GP, et al. Comparison of endovascular aneurysm repair with open repair in patients with abdominal aortic aneurysm (EVAR trial 1), 30-day operative mortality results: randomised controlled trial. Lancet. 2004;364(9437):843–848.

[2] Schermerhorn ML, Buck DB, O'Malley AJ, et al. Long-term outcomes of abdominal aortic aneurysm in the Medicare population. N Engl J Med. 2015;373(4):328-338.

[3] Paravastu SC, Jayarajasingam R, Cottam R, et al. Endovascular repair of abdominal aortic aneurysm. Cochrane Database Syst Rev. 2014;(1):CD004178.

[4] Stather PW, Sidloff D, Dattani N, et al. A review of current reporting of endoleak rates in endovascular aneurysm repair trials. J Vasc Surg. 2013;58(2):510-518.

[5] Chaikof EL, Dalman RL, Eskandari MK, et al. The Society for Vascular Surgery practice guidelines on the care of patients with an abdominal aortic aneurysm. J Vasc Surg. 2018;67(1):2-77.e2.

[6] Sidloff DA, Stather PW, Choke E, et al. Type II endoleak after endovascular aneurysm repair: conservative management is a safe strategy. Eur J Vasc Endovasc Surg. 2014;48(4):391-399.

[7] Mansour W, Cohoon KP, Niazi KA, et al. Current status of percutaneous endovascular and surgical management of type II endoleak. J Vasc Interv Radiol. 2015;26(5):616–624.

[8] Jones JE, Atkins MD, Brewster DC, et al. Persistent type II endoleak after endovascular repair of abdominal aortic aneurysm: incidence and outcomes. Ann Vasc Surg. 2007;21(6):667-679.
